feature_bullets: 【Durable ABS Material】: Our bathtub filter offers excellent heat resistance and high impact resistance, ensuring long-lasting durability without deformation or detachment.

【EASY TO INSTALL】 :Comes with two suspension cords to fit almost any bathtub faucet.You can choose the appropriate handle to complete the fixation based on the faucet. When the water level is too high, the attached splash guard can also be used to prevent water splashing.
【Improving Skin and Hair Health】:Filtering out harmful chemicals and heavy metals can help improve skin conditions, make hair softer and more lustrous.
【Shower Experience】:Bathing with filtered water can make the skin feel more comfortable and also enhance the overall quality of the bath water.

【Economical and high-quality 】 This tap water filter is a cost-effective solution with a filter life of 2,500 gallons before needing replacement. It offers lasting protection against harmful impurities, making it an excellent choice for any household.

top_reviews.title: Non-toxic bath filter delight
top_reviews.body: It hangs conveniently over the bath faucet and feels very durable with excellent quality. The multi-layer filtration system truly works—right away, I noticed the water feels softer with no lingering odor. After using it for a while, my skin feels less dry and more refreshed, and it’s definitely gentler on my hair. It’s non-toxic and provides great peace of mind, knowing it helps remove impurities and toxins, protecting the whole family. This bath water filter is absolutely amazing and incredibly easy to install, thanks to the clear instructions that made setup quick and stress-free.

top_reviews.title: Good bath filter for babies and kids
top_reviews.body: Managing to find a good bath filter was a relief, and this bathtub water filter fits the bill nicely. We installed it quickly in our bathroom, and now the water feels much softer and less harsh on the skin. It’s particularly handy since my toddler has sensitive skin, and I noticed less irritation after a few uses. The filter handles the chlorine well, and the water seems cleaner overall. It’s made a noticeable difference during our evening baths, making the whole experience more comfortable. Plus, the design fits our faucet easily, which was a bonus. I’m glad we gave this water softener a try for our tub.

top_reviews.title: Don't bother. Doesn't last.
top_reviews.body: Worked for about two weeks, so around eight baths total. You could tell from the first bath that it was working great. I bought water test strips to go along with it so I could verify its efficacy, which showed it working early on. After a couple of weeks it stopped working. The water was the same coming out as it was going in. Not worth it. I will be trying a different one to see if it's any better.

top_reviews.title: Pure Water Filter Efficiency
top_reviews.body: This filtration product delivers truly exceptional performance, thoroughly aligning with its marketing claims and profoundly exceeding my original expectations. As a seasoned professional within the beauty and skincare sector, my decision to purchase this filter ball was driven by an enthusiastic endorsement from a trusted, long-term client. The transformative effects have been nothing short of remarkable—it substantially elevates the quality of our bathing water, rendering it exceptionally mild and silky-soft. This dramatic improvement drastically minimizes the risk of irritation and cumulative damage to sensitive skin and fragile hair. Furthermore, I have incorporated it seamlessly into my personal daily skincare regimen. The difference is palpable: after cleansing with this filtered tap water, my skin feels distinctly smoother, more pliant and hydrated, and emanates a revitalized, healthy radiance that seems to originate from a deeper, well-nourished level.The installation procedure is engineered to be remarkably straightforward and user-intuitive, enabling individuals with no technical background to accomplish it effortlessly. The product includes a specially formulated, flexible silicone adapter sleeve that demonstrates outstanding versatility. It accommodates a vast array of non-standard, irregular, or uniquely designed faucet spouts with perfect ease, guaranteeing a completely seamless and frustration-free setup. This intelligent design effectively eliminates any requirement for cumbersome adjustments, additional tools, or complex modifications.Regarding its build quality and material integrity, the product exhibits superior craftsmanship and resilient durability. Its structural design is both robust and refined. Even when subjected to the rigorous demands of constant, daily operation over a prolonged duration, its filtration efficacy remains unwavering and reliable, showing no appreciable decline in performance or output quality.To conclude, this filter ball represents a superb and cleverly simplistic solution for everyday water enhancement. It operates reliably and consistently to refine water purity, soften texture, and remove undesirable elements without any ongoing effort from the user. I offer my unreserved and enthusiastic recommendation to anyone in search of an economically savvy yet highly effective method to upgrade their domestic water supply. The ancillary advantages for personal skincare, haircare, and overall household wellness are significant. This is, without doubt, a product that fully honors its promises and yields measurable, excellent results. The favorable alteration in water quality is immediately perceptible to the senses, and it unquestionably contributes delightful enhancements and valuable returns to one's daily living experience, solidifying its status as a prudent and rewarding investment for health-conscious individuals and families alike.

top_reviews.title: Bath filter helps skin
top_reviews.body: I started using this bath filter about a month ago and have noticed that the water feels much softer, which has been great for my skin. After long days at work, taking a bath with filtered water helps me relax without the usual dryness and tight feeling. The filter does a good job removing chlorine, and my skin no longer feels itchy afterwards. I also tried washing my hair with the filtered water, and it feels smoother and easier to manage. Setting it up was simple, and it fits well in my bathtub without any leaks. It’s been handy to have something that improves the bathwater quality, especially since I live in an area with hard water. I’m glad I gave this a try because it definitely makes a difference during my nighttime routine. So far, I’m pleased with how gentle the water is on my skin and hair.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on April 10, 2026

top_reviews.title: Good bath filter, works great
top_reviews.body: Cleaning up bath time has gotten a lot easier since we started using this bath filter. I was worried about all the stuff in our tap water, especially for the baby’s skin. Setting it up was a breeze, and it fits perfectly over our bathtub faucet without any extra parts. The difference is noticeable – no more harsh chlorine smell and the water just feels nicer. It has also been remarkably effective in helping relieve baby’s eczema by filtering out irritants from the water. We even set it up on subscribe and save since it’s something we want to keep using all the time. It’s been a few months and I’m glad we made the switch. Bath time is way more relaxing now and I feel better knowing the water is cleaner and gentler for the little one.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on March 19, 2026

top_reviews.title: Love the bath filter
top_reviews.body: Finding this bath filter has really improved my bathing experience. The water in our area is quite hard, and I always noticed it drying out my skin and sometimes causing itching. Since installing the filter, the water feels noticeably softer, and the strong chlorine smell has reduced a lot. I especially like how my skin feels much better afterward, and even my kids seem to enjoy bath time more now. It’s handy to have something like this that tackles the water quality directly without any complicated setup. I use it every day and can already tell the difference at home. If you have hard water issues, this filter could be a helpful addition to your bathroom. It’s working well for us and makes normal showers a bit nicer.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on April 3, 2026

top_reviews.title: Love this bath filter
top_reviews.body: Starting to use this bath filter has made a noticeable difference in how soft the water feels during my showers at home. The installation was straightforward, and I appreciate how quickly it started working without any fuss. Living in an area with hard water, I often experienced dryness and irritation after bathing, but now my skin feels calmer and less itchy. The filter also reduces the chlorine smell, which makes shower time much more pleasant. Using it especially helps my kids’ sensitive skin feel better too. It’s a simple addition to our bathroom routine that makes a real difference in water quality.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on March 28, 2026

top_reviews.title: Slow but effective.
top_reviews.body: I can not complain about this device due to the things it claims to filter from the water and the low price.  Just be aware that it is a slow process to fill a standard tub 3/4.  This will require 30+ minutes.  Still, you will get a clean bath. I also fill my plant watering vessel under it to give my plants clean water since chlorine kills needed microbes in their soil.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on April 4, 2026
